description: Real-time Communication - WebSocket streaming server, REST API endpoints, real-time data broadcasting, connection management, and frontend-backend communication for trading system

userStories.title: Set up WebSocket server foundation
userStories.description: As a backend system, I need to set up a WebSocket server to enable real-time communication with the frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement WebSocketManager class using FastAPI WebSocket
Set up /ws/stream endpoint for WebSocket connections
Implement connection lifecycle management (connect, disconnect, reconnect)
Create unit tests for WebSocket manager
Add integration tests with WebSocket client
Document WebSocket protocol and message format

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket authentication and authorization
userStories.description: As a secure system, I need to authenticate and authorize WebSocket connections to prevent unauthorized access.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement connection rejection for invalid tokens
Implement role-based access control for WebSocket channels
Implement token refresh for long-lived connections
Test authentication with valid and invalid tokens

userStories.title: Implement real-time price streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time price updates for all volatility indices via WebSocket.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement price update broadcasting via WebSocket
Stream tick data for V10, V25, V50, V75, V100
Stream OHLCV data for multiple timeframes (M1, M5, M15, H1)
Implement price update frequency (every 1 second for tick, every 5 seconds for OHLCV)
Add price data validation before broadcasting
Implement message format: {type: 'price', symbol: 'V10', bid: 1234.5, ask: 1235.5, timestamp: ...}
Test price streaming with multiple concurrent connections
Validate price updates match MT5 data
userStories.notes: Real-time prices are essential for trading dashboard

userStories.title: Implement real-time signal streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time trading signals as they are generated by the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Include signal metadata (symbol, direction, confidence, reasons, timestamp)
Implement signal format: {type: 'signal', symbol: 'V10', direction: 'buy', confidence: 75, reasons: [...], timestamp: ...}
Test signal streaming with multiple connections
userStories.notes: Real-time signals enable immediate trading decisions

userStories.title: Implement real-time trade execution events
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time updates when trades are executed, modified, or closed.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement trade event broadcasting via WebSocket
Implement event format: {type: 'trade_event', event: 'opened', symbol: 'V10', position_id: 12345, ...}

userStories.title: Implement real-time position updates
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time updates on open positions (P&L, duration, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: Implement position update broadcasting via WebSocket
Stream position status changes (SL/TP updates, partial closes)
Implement update format: {type: 'position_update', symbol: 'V10', position_id: 12345, pnl: 50.0, ...}
Implement position delta updates (only changed fields)
Implement position snapshot (full state on connection)
Test position updates with multiple connections
userStories.notes: Position updates are critical for risk monitoring

userStories.title: Implement real-time performance metrics streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time performance metrics (win rate, profit factor, drawdown).
acceptanceCriteria: Implement performance metrics broadcasting via WebSocket
Stream win rate updates (after each trade)
Stream profit factor updates (daily, weekly, monthly)
Implement metrics format: {type: 'performance', win_rate: 65.5, profit_factor: 1.8, max_drawdown: 12.3, ...}
Stream metrics on interval (every 30 seconds) and on trade close

userStories.title: Implement system status streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need to receive real-time system status updates (trading loop state, MT5 connection, errors).
acceptanceCriteria: Implement system status broadcasting via WebSocket
Stream trading loop state (running, paused, stopped)
Stream MT5 connection status (connected, disconnected, error)
Stream system health (CPU, memory, disk usage)
Implement status format: {type: 'system_status', trading_loop: 'running', mt5_connected: true, ...}
Implement status change notifications (only on change)

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket connection management
userStories.description: As a backend system, I need to manage WebSocket connections efficiently (reconnect, heartbeat, rate limiting).
acceptanceCriteria: Implement connection timeout detection (disconnect after 3 missed heartbeats)
Implement automatic reconnection handling (client-side with exponential backoff)
Implement connection rate limiting (max 10 connections per minute per user)
Test connection management with various scenarios

userStories.title: Implement WebSocket message queue and buffering
userStories.description: As a backend system, I need to implement message queuing to handle high-frequency updates efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement message queue for each connection
Implement message batching (send multiple updates in single frame)
Implement message buffer with max size (1000 messages)
Implement buffer overflow handling (drop old messages)
Implement queue flush on buffer full or timeout
Test message queuing under high load

userStories.title: Set up REST API foundation
userStories.description: As a backend system, I need to set up REST API endpoints for frontend communication.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement API router structure with FastAPI
Set up CORS middleware for frontend origin
Create unit tests for API endpoints
Add integration tests with API client
userStories.notes: Foundation for all REST API work

userStories.title: Implement account and trading control endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need REST API endpoints to fetch account info and control the trading system.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/v1/account - account information (balance, equity, margin)
Add rate limiting (10 requests per minute)
userStories.notes: Control endpoints are critical for system operation

userStories.title: Implement data retrieval endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need REST API endpoints to fetch positions, trades, signals, and performance data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add query parameters for filtering and pagination
Test endpoints with various query parameters

userStories.title: Implement configuration management endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need REST API endpoints to view and update system configuration.

userStories.title: Implement API documentation and testing interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive API documentation and a testing interface for development.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure FastAPI to serve docs at /docs
Add detailed descriptions for all endpoints
userStories.notes: Good documentation essential for frontend integration

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must provide WebSocket endpoint at /ws/stream
FR-2: System must stream real-time prices for 5 volatility indices
FR-3: System must stream trading signals as they are generated
FR-4: System must stream trade execution events
FR-5: System must stream position updates (P&L, status)
FR-6: System must stream performance metrics
FR-7: System must provide REST API endpoints for data retrieval
FR-8: System must provide control endpoints (start/stop/pause)
FR-9: System must implement WebSocket authentication
FR-10: System must handle 100+ concurrent WebSocket connections
nonGoals: No GraphQL API in this phase (REST only)
No WebRTC for audio/video in this phase
No message broker (RabbitMQ, Kafka) in this phase
technicalConsiderations: WebSocket connections are stateful (requires connection management)
Message queuing prevents blocking under high load
CORS configuration must match frontend origin
Error handling must be consistent across all endpoints
successMetrics: Price updates stream with < 100ms latency from MT5
Signal updates stream with < 50ms latency from generation
API documentation is comprehensive and accurate

architecture.websocketFlow: Client Connect → Authentication → Subscribe → Real-time Updates → Heartbeat → Disconnect
architecture.apiFlow: Client Request → Authentication → Rate Limit → Validation → Processing → Response
architecture.broadcasting: Event Generation → Queue → Broadcast → Client Delivery

timeline.phase2: Streaming (Days 4-7): Price, signal, trade event streaming
timeline.phase3: REST API (Days 8-10): API foundation, control endpoints
timeline.phase4: Data Endpoints (Days 11-13): Positions, trades, performance endpoints
timeline.phase5: Documentation (Days 14-15): API docs, testing interface, validation
